proof_or_counterexample_mode: exact route counterexample by continuous separation
attempt: Test whether the Weil autocorrelation cone can supply the dense cone required by TICKET125.
obstruction: Continuous identity evaluation confines autocorrelations to a closed half-space, so this cone is not dense in the full real test space.
next_experiment: Work directly on every admissible autocorrelation with the exact two moment constraints; do not invoke density in the full test space.
claim_boundary: No conjecture proof and no certified conjecture counterexample.
